summary: Completed comprehensive frontend testing of Celesta Glow brand alignment with celestaglow.com. All brand colors verified: Green (#22C55E), Dark navy (#1E293B), Yellow stars (#FACC15), White background. Product image loading from celestaglow.com CDN. All features working correctly on mobile viewport (390x844).
context_for_next_testing_agent: Brand alignment with celestaglow.com fully verified. All CSS variables and classes working correctly: --cg-green (#22C55E), --cg-dark (#1E293B), --cg-gold (#FACC15). Product image from celestaglow.com CDN loading correctly. Payment options toggle working with green selected state.

homepage_brand_alignment.details: Dark announcement bar (#1E293B), Green badge (#22C55E), Green 'Order Now' CTA with rounded-full corners, Product image from celestaglow.com CDN, 4 green checkmarks for benefits, Dark navy 'Shop Now' button, 20 yellow stars (#FACC15) in testimonials, 4 ingredient cards in '4 Serums in One' section, 3 FAQ accordion items

product_page_brand_alignment.details: Product image from celestaglow.com CDN, 5 yellow stars rating (#FACC15), Pricing ₹399 prepaid / ₹1499 MRP, 4 product benefits with green checkmarks, Green 'Order Now' button (#22C55E) with rounded-full corners

checkout_form.details: Green selected payment option border (#22C55E), Prepaid ₹399 option, COD ₹450 with ₹49 advance, Green 'Place Order' button, Button text updates dynamically (₹399 for prepaid, ₹49 for COD)

navigation.details: CELESTA GLOW logo style with stacked text, Slide-in menu with Home/Shop/Beauty Tips links, Active link highlighted with green background

details.green_22C55E: Verified in badge, CTA buttons, checkmarks, payment option borders - rgb(34, 197, 94)
details.dark_navy_1E293B: Verified in announcement bar, Shop Now buttons - rgb(30, 41, 59)
details.light_green_DCFCE7: Verified in ingredient number backgrounds - rgb(220, 252, 231)

mobile_responsiveness.details: All content renders correctly on 390x844 viewport, no horizontal overflow
